changes.reason: Schema 0.0 used the legacy `v` field before `schemaVersion` became the public durable version field.

reason: Release-record schema 0.0 is supported as the legacy `v`-only artifact shape and is normalized onto the public `schemaVersion` field before later migrations run.
Release-record schema 0.2 preserves the 0.1 wire shape; the explicit edge keeps older artifact readability covered by CI.
